# Rollin Dough Wood Fired Apizza

> Mobile wood fired apizza trailer based in Guilford, CT serving all of Connecticut. New Haven-style pizza catering for weddings, graduations, corporate events, and private parties.

## Contact
- Phone: (203) 675-1306
- Email: rollindoughmobile@gmail.com
- Website: https://rollindoughct.com
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/rollindoughct
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/rollindoughct

## Location
- Based in Guilford, CT 06437
- Serves all of Connecticut

## Catering Packages
All packages include 2 salads (Caesar & Mixed Greens), all-you-can-eat wood fired pizza, and choice of dessert (gelato, Italian ice, or cannoli). Tax included.

- Up to 50 guests: $1,400
- 50–75 guests: $1,700
- 75–100 guests: $2,000

## Menu

### Signature Pies
- Buffalo Chicken
- BBQ Chicken
- Chicken Bacon Ranch
- Margherita (white pie, fresh tomato)
- The Marco (white pie with bacon, ricotta & honey)
- The Mondo (white pie with roasted peppers, fresh mozz, ricotta & garlic)
- Creamy Vodka Chicken (vodka sauce, grilled chicken & fresh mozz)
- Hawaiian
- Mashed Potato (mozz & cheddar blend, bacon and/or broccoli, white pie)
- Clams Casino (clams, roasted peppers, bacon & garlic, white pie)
- Spaghetti & Meatballs

### Build Your Own
Hand-stretched dough with choice of toppings: pepperoni, sausage, meatball, bacon, chicken, clams, shrimp, mushrooms, onions, roasted red peppers, broccoli, spinach, eggplant, sliced tomato, pineapple, ricotta, fresh mozzarella, garlic, basil.

### Sides & Desserts
- Caesar Salad
- Mixed Greens Salad
- Gelato
- Italian Ice
- Cannoli

Gluten free options available upon request.

## Event Types
Weddings, graduation parties, corporate events, birthday parties, block parties, fundraisers, and private events.

## About
Fueled by 3 generations of dough-slinging grit, Rollin Dough makes authentic New Haven-style apizza cooked in a wood fired oven with a signature char. We offer both red and white pies.
